entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange and account platform currently operated under the Cryptology brand by Cypher Trading, UAB in Vilnius, Lithuania, offering buy, spot, futures, staking, deposit, withdrawal, and card-related services.
entity.notes: The previous Singapore origin is replaced with Lithuania because the current official site footer identifies Cypher Trading, UAB and a Vilnius address, and states authorization for virtual-currency exchange and custody services under Lithuanian FCIS supervision. The existing 2018 launch marker is retained because accessible first-party pages did not establish a more precise launch date.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Cryptology brand.

evidence.title: Cryptology official exchange and legal footer
evidence.notes: The official site identifies Cypher Trading, UAB, a Vilnius address, and Lithuanian FCIS supervision for virtual-currency exchange and custody services.

evidence.title: Cryptology official API client documentation
evidence.notes: The official documentation corroborates an active exchange API and market-data interface.
